ops.title: Ship cc-notes release with memo/decision glob fixes
ops.description: DurableInternalWrite missed `experiments/e0-gate-memo.md` on yasyf-home (write-like-me session 4487ad31): no WEAK/STRONG glob covers memo/decision-shaped paths, though INTERNAL_BODY_RE already carries `decisions?`. Extend WEAK_INTERNAL_GLOBS (`*memo*.md`, `*decision*.md`), add inline near-miss tests + firing/router tests incl. a golden fixture distilled from the real memo, then ship + tag so `@latest` pack consumers heal on their daily re-resolve. No `.claude/capt-hook.toml` version bump (frozen at 0.0.0 by design).

ops.text: WEAK_INTERNAL_GLOBS covers *memo*.md and *decision*.md; `uvx capt-hook --hooks plugin/hooks test` and `uv run plugin/hooks/tests/test_cc_notes.py` both green, including a golden fixture reproducing the e0-gate-memo incident path+body
a stable release tag containing the fix is published with release workflow and tap-bump job green
